# Reference (autogenerated)

This page renders the public-API docstrings directly from source. The
`jldoctest` fences (per Bennett-wlf6 / U145) are executed by
`make.jl`; if any output drifts the docs build fails with the
expected/actual diff. See the curated [API Reference](api.md) for prose
documentation organised by topic.

## Compilation

```@docs
reversible_compile
```
